label: Win
description: Applies to every match. Penalty shootout winners count as match winners.

label: Draw
description: Applies to drawn matches before any penalty shootout.

label: Goal scored
description: Each goal in normal or extra time scores one point. Shootout goals do not count.

label: Clean sheet
description: A team earns this when it concedes no goals in normal or extra time.

label: Qualify from group
description: Awarded once a team is confirmed through the group stage.

label: Win group
description: Awarded once a team is confirmed top of its group.

label: Finish group unbeaten
description: Awarded for completing the group without a loss.

label: Furthest stage: Last 32
description: Progress points are based on the furthest stage reached only.

label: Furthest stage: Last 16
description: Replaces the Last 32 progress score if the team goes further.

label: Furthest stage: Quarter Final
description: Replaces earlier progress scores when the team reaches the quarters.

label: Furthest stage: Semi Final
description: Replaces earlier progress scores when the team reaches the semis.

label: Furthest stage: Final
description: Replaces earlier progress scores when the team reaches the final.

label: Furthest stage: Winner
description: The tournament winner gets this as its furthest-stage score.

label: T2 qualifies from group
description: Tier bonus for a T2 team getting out of the group.

label: T2 reaches Quarter Final
description: Tier bonuses are cumulative for lower-tier overperformance.

label: T2 reaches Semi Final
description: Added on top of earlier T2 tier bonuses.

label: T2 reaches Final
description: Added on top of earlier T2 tier bonuses.

label: T2 wins tournament
description: Added if a T2 team wins the whole tournament.

label: T3 qualifies from group
description: Tier bonus for a T3 team getting out of the group.

label: T3 reaches Quarter Final
description: Tier bonuses are cumulative for lower-tier overperformance.

label: T3 reaches Semi Final
description: Added on top of earlier T3 tier bonuses.

label: T3 reaches Final
description: Added on top of earlier T3 tier bonuses.

label: T3 wins tournament
description: Added if a T3 team wins the whole tournament.

label: T2 beats T1
description: Awarded when a T2 team beats a T1 team.

label: T3 beats T2
description: Awarded when a T3 team beats a T2 team.

label: T3 beats T1
description: Awarded when a T3 team beats a T1 team.
